Remote Office & Digital Support · Web Content · Documents · Quality Review · AI-Assisted Workflows

Remote digital support specialist with long-term experience in online research, document handling, web content maintenance, SEO-oriented updates, spreadsheets, structured summaries and practical backoffice coordination for a German business environment.

I am looking for broad remote roles that match this profile: office/admin support, web content, document workflows, quality review, data organisation, quotation or tender-related support. AI-agent tools and frameworks are part of my working toolkit for research, checking, drafting and organising tasks faster and more carefully — not the only type of work I am looking for.

Focus: remote office support, web content maintenance, document and data workflows, quality review, research support, quotation/tender support, AI-assisted task organisation.

Focus

Remote office support · Web content · SEO · Documents · Spreadsheets · Quality review · Research · AI-assisted workflows · Multilingual UA/RU/EN/DE

Skills
  • Remote office and document support: Microsoft Office, spreadsheets, structured records, status tracking and written follow-up
  • Website and content work: WordPress, HTML, CSS, GitHub, web content management, online publishing and SEO-oriented updates
  • Quality review: content quality, source checking, data quality, information verification and document review
  • Research support: structured online research, comparison tables, short summaries and organised findings
  • Quotation and tender-related support: extracting information, preparing checklists, tables and structured summaries
  • Portal workflow coordination: application forms, account workflows, KYC-style steps and multi-step online processes
  • AI-assisted workflows: Hermes Agent, Claude Code, OpenClaw-style agents, AI Agents and Human-in-the-Loop QA used as practical work tools
  • Multilingual handling of research, correspondence and documents: Ukrainian, Russian, English and German
Professional Experience

Remote Office & Digital SupportSelf-employed · Freelance · 2025 – Present

  • Provide practical remote support for research, document preparation, source comparison, structured tables, checklists, forms and portal-based tasks.
  • Use AI-agent tools such as Hermes Agent, Claude Code and OpenClaw-style agents to speed up research, drafting, checking and organisation while keeping human review and final quality control.
  • Prepare and review materials for multilingual text tasks, office workflows, quotation/tender-related support, web content and everyday digital operations.
  • Combine digital task organisation with hands-on office support, spreadsheets, documents and quality review.

Aurea Energie GmbH & Co. KGRemote Office, Research & Digital Support · Aug 2012 – Dec 2025

  • Supported a German company remotely with online research, source checking, data organisation, spreadsheets, summaries, comparison overviews and structured project information.
  • Created, updated and maintained the company website, including content updates, layout improvements, SEO-oriented changes and practical website maintenance.
  • Prepared structured information, tables, short summaries and written materials to support everyday business work.

FreelanceWeb Content & Front-End Support · 2015 – 2025

  • Created and maintained websites, landing pages and WordPress pages for project-based clients.
  • Worked with website content, layouts, HTML/CSS, WordPress, GitHub, online publishing, SEO-oriented updates and practical front-end improvements.
  • Supported multilingual content preparation, text editing and digital publishing tasks.

Own Private EnterpriseOperations & Management · 2006 – 2012

  • Designed, launched and ran an independent business, organising day-to-day operations and a network of 5 shops, including coordination of staff, suppliers and customer communication.
